title: World Cup 2026 Album Index
description: Enter the country code (e.g., URU, MEX, BRA) and find out which page to stick it on.
goodbyeIndex: Goodbye to flipping through the index like in the 90s!
lessBrowsing: Less browsing 📖 = More years of life for your album 😉
searchPlaceholder: Search by code (MEX), country or page...
noResults: No countries found with that code
sureNotPasted: Are you sure you haven't typed it wrong?
starMessage: Star the repo if this helped you out
shareText: Quickly find which page each sticker goes in your album
kofiMessage: If you liked the site, buy me a coffee to keep adding awesome features 😉
kofiSubMessage: The minimum is just 1 dollar. Yep, cheaper than a pack of stickers 😂.
aboutParagraph1: Hi! I'm the developer behind Album FIFA Index 2026 ☕⚽
aboutParagraph2: This app was born out of pure frustration 😂: I was pasting stickers and got tired of having to go back to the album's physical index every time to see which page each country was on. I wanted to paste, not browse! So I built this search tool as quickly as possible.
aboutParagraph3: Plus, to keep the kids (and the not-so-kids!) entertained, I added fun facts about each national team while they look for their pages.
aboutParagraph4a: If the app saved you time trading duplicates or pasting as a family, you can
aboutParagraph4c: and it's more than welcome! With your support, Studio84 will keep the search tool fast, ad-free, and with new features I'm already planning. Thanks for the support! 🙌
